languages.text: "То, что вы, магос, живы и находитесь внутри петли — отдельная часть местных странностей. Вы помните, как попали сюда?"

traits.locale_text: драфт: интересно, какова ваша природа, что же вы такое

languages.text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"
languages.original_text: "То, что вы, магос, живы и находитесь внутри петли — отдельная часть местных странностей. Вы помните, как попали сюда?"

traits.locale_text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"
"The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"
"The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"

languages.text: “贤者，你还活着并身陷循环这一事实，本身就是这异常现象中的反常之事。你还记得自己是怎么来到这儿的吗？”
languages.original_text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"

traits.locale_text: “贤者，你还活着并身陷循环这一事实，本身就是这异常现象中的反常之事。你还记得自己是怎么来到这儿的吗？”

languages.text: « Le fait que vous êtes en vie et dans cette boucle, magos, est en soi un détail étrange de cette anomalie. Vous rappelez-vous comment vous êtes arrivé ici ? »
languages.original_text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"

traits.locale_text: « Le fait que vous êtes en vie et dans cette boucle, magos, est en soi un détail étrange de cette anomalie. Vous rappelez-vous comment vous êtes arrivé ici ? »

languages.text: "Magos, hem döngünün içinde hem de hayatta olman bu anomaliyi başlı başına tuhaf kılıyor. Buraya nasıl geldiğini hatırlıyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"

traits.locale_text: "Magos, hem döngünün içinde hem de hayatta olman bu anomaliyi başlı başına tuhaf kılıyor. Buraya nasıl geldiğini hatırlıyor musun?"

languages.text: «El hecho de que usted esté vivo y dentro del bucle, magos, es un detalle muy peculiar de esta anomalía. ¿Recuerda cómo acabó aquí?».
languages.original_text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"

traits.locale_text: «El hecho de que usted esté vivo y dentro del bucle, magos, es un detalle muy peculiar de esta anomalía. ¿Recuerda cómo acabó aquí?».

languages.text: "Der Umstand, dass Ihr lebt und Teil der Schleife seid, Magos, ist allein schon ein seltsames Detail dieser Anomalie. Erinnert Ihr Euch, wie Ihr hier gelandet seid?"
languages.original_text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"

traits.locale_text: "Der Umstand, dass Ihr lebt und Teil der Schleife seid, Magos, ist allein schon ein seltsames Detail dieser Anomalie. Erinnert Ihr Euch, wie Ihr hier gelandet seid?"

languages.text: 「あなたが生きていて、このループの中にいるという事実は、この異常事態において、奇妙な詳細です。あなたは、どうしてここにたどり着いたのか、覚えていますか？」
languages.original_text: "The fact that you are alive and inside the loop, Magos, is its own strange detail in this anomaly. Do you remember how you ended up here?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが生きていて、このループの中にいるという事実は、この異常事態において、奇妙な詳細です。あなたは、どうしてここにたどり着いたのか、覚えていますか？」
